title: Three D Food Process Step Infographic AI
sourceTitle: Three D Food Process Step Infographic AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 3:4 3D food-process infographic for xiaolongbao, presented as a clean premium educational cooking poster. Subject: xiaolongbao is demonstrated through sequential miniature 3D stations, with friendly 3D chef guiding the full process from preparation to finished dish. Scene: Warm beige gradient infographic background with separate step panels, food tools, ingredients, soft steam, and a friendly premium children-science animation atmosphere. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 timeline board: numbered independent panels connected by a clear process path, with knead dough, mix filling, roll wrappers, wrap, steam, serve shown in order, enough spacing between stations, and the final dish reveal at the end. Signature Elements: friendly 3D chef, six-step cooking timeline, independent process panels, miniature tools and ingredients, high-detail steam, final plated reveal, and 3D food-science poster clarity. Style: Semi-realistic 3D food texture, polished culinary advertising quality, cute educational character direction, high-detail steam effects, clean geometry, and friendly premium science-animation finish. Color Palette: Warm beige gradient base, appetizing natural food colors, soft cream panel surfaces, gentle brown and gold accents, and clean readable label contrast. Lighting: Soft natural light with gentle shadows, appetizing highlights on food surfaces, visible steam depth, and bright clean infographic readability. Typography: Short readable step labels identify knead dough, mix filling, roll wrappers, wrap, steam, serve; text stays minimal, numbered, and integrated into each panel without crowding the 3D food. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
